signals.headline: Solana $280M Drift Protocol Exploit Confirmed with Foundation Response | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana $280M Drift Protocol Exploit Confirmed with Foundation Response | NO | HIGH confidence**  
A $280–285M security breach on Solana's Drift Protocol occurred on April 12, 2026, via social engineering and admin control seizure, prompting the Solana Foundation to launch STRIDE (independent security audits) and SIRN (incident response network).[1][2]
